title: On- and offshore crude oil inventory drop reflects fundamental market tightening
section_path: On- and offshore crude oil inventory drop reflects fundamental market tightening
section_path_text: On- and offshore crude oil inventory drop reflects fundamental market tightening
summary:
Main
OPEC+ cut efforts combined with more resilient demand than most think are leading to a steep drop in crude oil stocks in onshore tanks and on the water. By Armen Azizian
Lacklustre market fundamentals or at least the perception thereof have put oil prices under quite some pressure over the spring period. OPEC+ has reacted with announced cuts, but individual countries led by Saudi Arabia and Russia have really scaled up efforts over the last two months.
